landing.title:
An infinite space
for your thoughts.
landing.subtitle: Block editor and infinite canvas together. Your notes, drawings, and ideas — all in one place.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything is easier than you think.

features.editorDesc: Add headers, lists, and task boxes with slash commands. Drag and rearrange blocks.
features.canvasDesc: Draw, add shapes, create diagrams. No boundaries, no zoom limits, no restrictions.
features.syncDesc: Instant access on phone, tablet, computer — any device. Saved automatically.
features.themeDesc: A modern interface that adapts to your preferences, easy on the eyes.

emptyState.title: Your notes will appear here
emptyState.description: Create a new document or canvas from the left panel. Your thoughts, drawings, and ideas in one place.

1.title: 1. Overview
1.p1: At TideNote ("we", "app"), we respect your privacy. This policy explains how personal data collected through the TideNote website, mobile apps, and desktop app ("Service") is processed. By using our Service, you agree to this policy.

2.title: 2. Data We Collect
2.sub1_item3: Profile picture (retrieved from your Google profile if logging in with Google, optional)
2.sub1_item4: Password (stored as an encrypted hash only, never in plain text)
2.sub2_item1: Notes, documents, and canvas drawings you create
2.sub2_item3: Files and images (added to the canvas)
2.sub3_item1: In-app preferences (theme, language, editor size) stored in local storage
2.sub4_item1: IP address (automatically processed by the Firebase infrastructure)
2.sub4_item2: Device type, operating system, browser information

3.title: 3. How We Use Data
3.p1: We use your data for the following purposes:
3.p2: We never sell your data to third parties or use it for advertising purposes.

4.title: 4. Third-Party Services
4.sub1_p1: Our Service uses the Google Firebase infrastructure:
4.sub1_item3: Firebase Hosting: Serving the web application
4.sub2_p1: If you use "Sign in with Google", we retrieve your name, email, and profile picture from your Google profile. Google's Privacy Policy applies: https://policies.google.com/privacy
4.sub3_p1: We use RevenueCat to process Premium subscription requests. Your payment information (credit card, etc.) is never stored on our servers; it is processed directly by the Apple App Store or Google Play Store. RevenueCat Privacy Policy: https://www.revenuecat.com/privacy

5.title: 5. Data Retention
5.p1: We store your data until you delete your account.
5.p2: Upon account deletion, your data is permanently removed from our systems within 30 days (including backup copies).
5.p3: Some data may be retained for longer periods if required by law.

6.title: 6. Data Security
6.p1: All data is encrypted in transit using SSL/TLS.
6.p2: Passwords are securely hashed by Firebase Authentication, never stored in plain text.
6.p3: Firebase Firestore security rules ensure you only access your own data — other users' data cannot be read.

7.title: 7. Your Rights (GDPR / KVKK)
7.p1: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
7.item1: Access: The right to know what data we store about you
7.item2: Correction: The right to request correction of inaccurate data
7.item3: Deletion: The right to request deletion of all data and your account (in-app Settings → Account → Delete Account)
7.item4: Portability: The right to export your data (Settings → Import / Export)
7.item5: Objection: The right to object to data processing

8.title: 8. Cookies & Local Storage
8.p1: TideNote does not use third-party advertising cookies. We only store:
8.item2: User preferences (theme, language, toolbar position) — in browser localStorage, on your device only

9.title: 9. Children's Privacy
9.p1: Our Service is not intended for children under 13. If we notice we have collected data from someone under 13, we delete it immediately.

10.title: 10. Policy Changes
10.p1: We may update this policy from time to time. You will be notified via email for significant changes. The current policy is always published on this page.

1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
1.p1: By using TideNote ("Service"), you agree to these Terms of Use ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these terms, do not use our Service.

2.title: 2. Service Description
2.p1: TideNote is a cloud-based productivity tool that brings block-based note-taking and infinite canvas whiteboard features together in a single application. It is available on Web, iOS, Android, and Desktop platforms.

3.title: 3. Account Creation and Security
3.item1: You must create an account with a valid email address to use the Service
3.item2: You are responsible for the security of your account credentials and all activities occurring under your account
3.item3: Do not share your password with anyone
3.item4: If you notice unauthorized access to your account, contact us immediately: info@tidenote.app
3.item5: A person can create only one account

4.title: 4. Acceptable Use
4.p1: You may not use our Service for the following purposes:
4.item2: Violating others' copyrights, trademarks, or intellectual property rights
4.item3: Distributing malware, viruses, or malicious code
4.item4: Disrupting or overloading the normal operations of the Service
4.item5: Attempting unauthorized access to other users' data
4.item7: Usage by children under 13 years of age
4.p2: Accounts that violate these rules may be suspended or closed without prior notice.

5.title: 5. Intellectual Property
5.sub1_p1: Notes, drawings, and other content you create belong to you. TideNote claims no ownership rights over your content.
5.sub1_p2: You only grant TideNote this limited license: the right to process and store your content for the purpose of presenting, syncing, and backing it up for you.
5.sub2_p1: The application name, logo, design, source code, and interface belong to TideNote and are protected by copyright laws. You may not copy, distribute, or create derivative works of these elements without permission.

6.title: 6. Subscriptions and Payments
6.sub1_p1: Basic features are offered for free. A 1 GB cloud storage limit is applied on the Free plan.
6.sub2_item2: Subscriptions are processed via Stripe on Web, Apple App Store on iOS, and Google Play Store on Android
6.sub2_item3: Subscriptions renew automatically every month unless canceled
6.sub2_item4: Prices may change with prior notification
6.sub3_item1: Web: Cancel anytime under Settings → Plan & Billing
6.sub3_item2: iOS: Via App Store subscription management
6.sub3_item3: Android: Via Google Play subscription management
6.sub3_p1: Upon cancellation, you will continue to enjoy Premium features until the end of your billing cycle.
6.sub4_item1: Web subscriptions (Stripe): You can request a full refund within 7 days of purchase (info@tidenote.app)
6.sub4_item2: iOS subscriptions: Apple's refund policy applies
6.sub4_item3: Android subscriptions: Google Play's refund policy applies
6.sub4_p1: Refund requests after 7 days will be reviewed but are not guaranteed.

7.title: 7. Modification and Termination of Service
7.sub1_p1: TideNote reserves the right to modify features, pricing, or the service with prior notice. Important changes will be announced at least 30 days in advance.
7.sub2_item1: You can delete your account at any time under Settings → Account → Delete Account
7.sub2_item2: TideNote may terminate your account without prior notice in case of a violation of the Terms of Use
7.sub2_item3: When an account is deleted, all your data is permanently deleted within 30 days

8.title: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
8.p1: The Service is provided "as is". TideNote does not warrant:
8.item1: That the service will run uninterrupted or error-free
8.item2: That no data loss will occur
8.item3: The fitness of the service for a particular purpose
8.p2: We recommend exporting your important content regularly (Settings → Export) to guard against any risk of data loss.

9.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
9.p1: TideNote's maximum liability for any reason shall not exceed the subscription fees paid by you in the last 12 months. TideNote shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages.

10.title: 10. Governing Law
10.p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Turkey. İstanbul courts have jurisdiction over any disputes.

11.title: 11. Changes to Terms
11.p1: We may update these Terms. You will be notified via email for significant changes. Continuing to use the Service after changes indicates your acceptance of the new Terms.
